title: Wrong Wi-Fi profile selected

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Laptop cannot connect to office Wi-Fi
servicenow_seed.description: Caller returned from travel and their laptop keeps joining Guest Wi-Fi instead of the corporate SSID.

correct_steps: Confirm user is in office and other users are online
Forget Guest and old corporate profile
Reconnect to corporate SSID with current credentials
Run ipconfig and confirm internal IP
rationale: Single device joining the wrong SSID is Tier 1. Network Operations is not needed unless multiple users are affected.

tool_clues.wifi: AP health normal. Device associated to Guest SSID.
